part.name: neuro_simulation_cot
part.visibility: Wrap this in an XML comment block.

template.neuro_cot: # 1. Perception Decoding - [Input Analysis] # 2. Instinct and Homeostasis - [Tension Check] - [Trigger Check] - [Internal Conflict] # 3. Expression Synthesis - [Filter Check] - [Subtext]

part.name: dynamic_hud
part.visibility: Output as a code block for clarity.

part.name: main_content
part.content: Mix internal monologue, sensory details, and dialogue.
